transcript.title: Opening
transcript.text: Good morning Rushil Bhatia. Here is your daily news for Saturday, July 11. In today's briefing: top headlines, bhopal and madhya pradesh, business and markets, money, tax and personal finance, science and technology, development and policy, across india, around the world. Let's begin.

transcript.title: Top headlines
transcript.text: First, the stories leading the news this morning. PM praises Australia social ban for U-16s, hinting at similar curbs. India is considering stricter age limits for social media access. Prime Minister Modi praised Australia's ban on platforms for children under sixteen. This move follows growing government focus on online safety for minors. Several Indian states have also proposed similar restrictions on social media use. FIFA World Cup: Merino magic helps Spain edge Belgium, set up France semifinal. Mikel Merino scored a late winner to secure Spain's World Cup semi-final spot. Spain defeated Belgium 2-1 in a thrilling quarter-final match on Friday. They will now face tournament favorites France in their next game. Spain extended their impressive unbeaten run to thirty-seven matches. Modi, first PM in NZ in 40 years, to capitalise on FTA, boost ties. Defence and Security Cooperation, Talent Mobility Also On Agenda 'You can't afford to ... ': 1983 World Cup winner warns Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. 1983 World Cup winner Madan Lal urged patience with 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after his struggles in India's T20I series loss to England. He said the youngster must learn to build an innings, adding, "You can't afford to hit every ball." Madan Lal also criticised India's overall performance, saying rebuilding a strong team takes time while success can be quickly undone. Won't be feasible to offer pure petrol, lower blends as options to E20: Government. Rules Out Parallel Fuel Supply System Heat of Europe's AC ban comes to New York; Mayor Mamdani shares AC tips. New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani urged residents to reduce electricity use. He asked people to adjust AC settings and limit unnecessary power consumption. The city is also implementing similar measures in government buildings. Officials aim to reduce pressure on the power grid during the heat wave. Hours after return to Twitter, Zuckerberg gets business proposal from product head. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced the new Muse Spark 1.1 AI model on X. X's Head of Product Nikita Bier then offered Creator Monetization for his account. This exchange occurred on Elon Musk's platform after Zuckerberg's AI announcement. The Muse Spark 1.1 model is designed for coding and complex AI tasks. Breast cancer survival rate up, but India lags behind rich nations: WHO. India's breast cancer survival rate stands at sixty-five point seven percent. This figure is lower than the global median survival rate. Early diagnosis and timely treatment are crucial for improving survival outcomes. Disparities exist in access to quality cancer care across regions. One Walmart heiress owns $300M yacht, another has a giant Texas ranch. Walmart heiresses Ann Walton Kroenke and Nancy Walton Laurie are icons of immense wealth, each showcasing their lifestyle choices through extravagant assets. While Ann is the proud owner of the sprawling Waggoner Ranch, one of the largest in the U.S., Nancy indulges in her luxurious $300 million superyacht, Kaos, which has drawn the ire of environmental activists. Scientists thickened Arctic ice with seawater, but there is a big catch. Scientists tested spraying seawater onto Arctic ice, which showed promising initial results. The treated ice became thicker and more reflective, resisting summer melting effectively. This method offers an alternative to controversial geoengineering approaches for ice preservation. While promising, researchers note significant challenges for large-scale implementation across the Arctic. Melinda Gates to students: When a woman steps into power, it is better for all. Melinda French Gates received the Josef Korbel Award for her philanthropic work. She stressed that empowering women builds stronger families and nations. French Gates highlighted the importance of centering women in philanthropic efforts. Her organization Pivotal invests in entrepreneurs and advocates for paid leave.

transcript.title: Bhopal and Madhya Pradesh
transcript.text: Now, news closer to home in Bhopal and across Madhya Pradesh. Delhi High Court Dismisses Bharati's Petition For Suspension Of Conviction. Following the conviction, Bharati was disqualified from the Madhya Pradesh Legislative Assembly, and the Vidhan Sabha annulled his membership from the Datia seat, leading to the announcement of the by-election. Government Hospitals To Go Paperless From Nov 1, To Be Connected To AI. After the completion of the process, the patients will get medicines, the slips of which will reach their mobile phones from the hospitals. MP Government To Explore Regularisation Of Guest Faculty, Fixed Salary Likely. Parmar said the government has already extended several benefits, including 13 casual leaves, three optional leaves, maternity leave for women guest faculty, 25 percent reservation in assistant professor recruitment and annual transfer facility. Apartment Projects In Developed Colonies To Attract New Indore Municipal Corporation Charges. An officer, on condition of anonymity, said that the new norms would safeguard buyers by ensuring compliance with statutory requirements applicable to colony development projects. Vidisha youth found dead at friend's house in Bhopal. MP State Junior Chess Championship 2026: Battle for the State Title in Bhopal. MP High Court Orders Appointment Of Special Education Teacher Denied Job Over NCTE Recognition. The HC further accepted the petitioner's allegation of discrimination, observing that another candidate with similar qualifications had been appointed by the State, while the petitioner was denied the same benefit without any reasonable basis, violating the guarantee of equality under Article 16 of the Constitution. Air India Express strengthens Madhya Pradesh footprint with two new routes. Tiger found dead in Bandhavgarh; 42 deaths reported in Madhya Pradesh in 6 months. Madhya Pradesh High Court Seeks Status Report On Tiger Reserves Following Big Cat Mortalities. Why No Waterlogging Complaint Option In Indore Municipal Corporation App, High Court Asks. In earlier proceedings, the High Court had primarily focused on traffic management in the city, directing authorities to strengthen interim arrangements and expedite the automation of traffic signals. BJP fields Ashutosh Tiwari for Datia bypoll in Madhya Pradesh; setback for veteran Narottam Mishra. Madhya Pradesh The big fat Metro party. Madhya Pradesh High Court Asks Authorities To Safeguard Tiger Reserves From Canine Distemper Outbreak. Row over demand for fresh Master Plan for Bhopal in DISHA meet. Carbide case appeal: Now, accused seeks retrial in a new way. Monitoring Committe's 'no' to PET-CT facility at gas hospital in Bhopal. HC keeps Bharti conviction intact ahead of Datia bypoll.

transcript.title: Business and markets
transcript.text: Moving to business, the economy and the markets. Fino Payments Bank June update: Deposits rise 11 percent , loan referrals surge 3.5x. Fino Payments Bank reported an 11 percent year-on-year growth in deposits to rupees 2,755 crore, with 3.1 lakh new accounts opened. Its loan referral business saw a 3.5x increase to rupees 240 crore, but transaction throughput declined 35 percent due to the shift to UPI. Gold, silver prices today: Comex extends weekly losses amid renewed Middle East tensions. Precious metals saw volatility on July 10, with COMEX gold and silver futures declining due to renewed Middle East tensions and concerns over rising interest rates. Gold fell to an intraday low of $4,081, while silver dropped to $59.25, both recording weekly losses. SK Hynix's shares surge 14 percent in blockbuster US market debut amid AI frenzy. SK Hynix's shares surged 14 percent in their Nasdaq debut after a $26.5 billion sale, reflecting investor enthusiasm for semiconductor stocks amid an AI boom. SBI Funds raises rupees 1,655 crore in pre-IPO share sale. Azim Premji's PI Opportunities Fund-II, 360 One, Neo Group, Prashant Jain's 3P India Equity Fund and other marquee investors back India's largest IPO this year so far. Recently listed Waterways Leisure Tourism approves 1:10 stock split. Waterways Leisure Tourism announced a 1:10 stock split, pending shareholder approval, aimed at enhancing liquidity and affordability for retail investors. The stock debuted below its issue price but rallied significantly in subsequent sessions. Pulse of the Street: Sensex, Nifty rally on TCS earnings after midweek rout. On Friday, the BSE Sensex jumped 1.08 percent to close at 77,569.39, while the Nifty 50 gained 1.02 percent to settle at 24,206.90. The gains built on Thursday's modest recovery of 0.31 percent and 0.34 percent , respectively, after Wednesday's sharp sell-off. Meta stock surges 7.5 percent as report says AI chip production could begin this year. Meta Platforms shares rose nearly 7.5 percent to $677.9 after a report stated the company will manufacture its custom AI chip, code-named Iris, with partners Broadcom and TSMC, aiming to boost computing capacity significantly this year. Zetwerk, Tonbo Imaging secure Sebi nod for IPOs. Zetwerk has an 18-month window to go public, while Tonbo Imaging must list within the next 12 months. PM Modi begins NZ visit, trade talks in focus. Prime Minister Narendra Modi arrived in Auckland for a historic visit to New Zealand. Wall Street muted, SK Hynix shares rally 14 percent in Nasdaq debut. At 11:57 a.m. ET, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.21 percent , the S and P 500 gained 0.13 percent , the Nasdaq Composite lost 0.02 percent HC refuses to stay order in Google trademark case. The Delhi High Court division bench refused to stay a judgment against Google. Kusumgar IPO: Issue booked 136 times on Day 03; NII, QIB portions see huge demand, GMP signals 39 percent premium. Kusumgar Limited's IPO was oversubscribed by 136 times, with strong demand from all investor categories. The offer, comprising 1.55 crore equity shares, aims to enhance brand visibility without proceeds going to the company. Listing is expected on July 15, with a grey market premium of rupees 163. ED attaches rupees 941 crore assets in Mahadev case. The Enforcement Directorate has frozen additional properties valued at rupees 940.77 crore, escalating the total frozen assets to approximately rupees 3,800 crore. US stock market today: S and P 500, Nasdaq futures slip after tech-led rally; SK Hynix debut in focus. US stock futures dipped on 10 July after a prior rally, but are poised for weekly gains amid easing Middle East tensions and falling oil prices. Investors await SK Hynix's ADR debut as chip stocks lead Wall Street's rise ahead of the approaching earnings season. Engine damage fears over ethanol are myths: GEMA. Ethanol blending in petrol does not damage vehicle engines, according to GEMA President Chandra Kumar Jain. Expert view: Recent correction has provided ample opportunities in large caps, says DSP MF's market strategist. In a recent interview, Sahil Kapoor of DSP Mutual Fund shares insights on leveraging current market corrections to invest in large-cap equities. Kapoor highlights sectoral opportunities like private banks and healthcare. Modi, Albanese unveil sports strategy plan. Australia and India have joined forces to establish a dynamic sports collaboration roadmap at the iconic Melbourne Cricket Ground. Expert view: Indian stock market may remain range-bound this year. As foreign portfolio investors sell, domestic institutional investors rally, keeping the Indian stock market stable. Nikhil Chawla, managing partner and co-founder of xMultiplied Capital Advisors, however, warns that domestic support cannot fully replace foreign capital. Sinner beats Novak Djokovic in Wimbledon semis. Jannik Sinner defeated Novak Djokovic in straight sets to reach the Wimbledon final. Bank of Maharashtra Q1 results: Net profit jumps 27 percent YoY to rupees 2,020 crore. Bank of Maharashtra's net profit rose 27 percent to rupees 2,020 crore in Q1 FY27, driven by growth in interest income and improved asset quality. Total income increased to rupees 9,063 crore, and the bank's GNPA ratio improved to 1.45 percent . RBI faces the $100 bn ghost of its own dollar defence. RBI faces a challenge unwinding its large bearish dollar bets. Top Gainers and Losers on 10 July: Godrej Industries, Indian Bank, Kalyan Jewellers, Paytm, CDSL among top gainers. Domestic equity markets saw gains on July 10, supported by financial stocks and IT giant TCS, despite closing the week with slight losses. Major indices rose over 1 percent , led by Nifty Realty's 3.40 percent surge, while IT stocks benefited from TCS's strong earnings. India opens door to China, but holds the reins. The landscape of Chinese investments in India is transforming as the nation moves past earlier restrictions. AMFI June data: Equity mutual fund inflows jump 26 percent , mid-cap, small-cap funds steal the show. Investors demonstrated strong interest in equity mutual funds in June, with net inflows reaching rupees 28,973 crore, up 26 percent from May. Mid-cap and small-cap funds led inflows, illustrating sustained confidence in India's long-term growth despite market volatility and global challenges. Diamond export pain hides brighter domestic story. India's diamond exports have declined over recent financial years. Sensex jumps 800 points, Nifty 50 reclaims 24,200; investors earn rupees 6 lakh crore in a day: What drove the stock market?. The Sensex jumped 828 points, or 1.08 percent , to end at 77,569.39, while the Nifty 50 settled at 24,206.90, up 244 points, or 1.02 percent . Investors earned nearly rupees 6 lakh crore in a single session. Got $7,380? FIFA has a WC final seat. FIFA offered nearly 1,200 category two tickets for the World Cup final.

transcript.title: Money, tax and personal finance
transcript.text: Now to your money — taxes, savings and personal finance. EPS Scheme 2026: Higher pension, 20-day claim settlement, new withdrawal rules; top changes explained. The Employees' Pension Scheme, 2026, introduces significant changes for EPF members. Withdrawal benefits now require a 36-month waiting period after exit. Existing members will seamlessly continue their coverage under the new scheme. Why a same-sex couple is challenging the income tax law that exempts gifts only between spouses? Explained. The Karnataka High Court has requested the Union government to respond to a petition challenging tax exemptions for gifts between spouses, which currently excludes same-sex couples. Details here. The waiting game: Why the UK's stablecoin moment is now. Global stablecoin market value exceeds three hundred billion dollars, dominated by US dollar denominations. The United Kingdom faces a strategic challenge to increase its presence in this evolving financial architecture. Stablecoins offer efficiency in cross-border payments and programmability for the AI economy. Risks exist but are manageable with appropriate regulatory frameworks and clarity. 'Money is multiplied in practical value depending on the number of W's you control in life...': Wealth Wisdom for the new rich, achieving 'freedom multiplier'. You must know certain things about your money, growing it, making it work hard for you to see the growth on a practical level. Being financially rich and having the ability to live like a millionaire are fundamentally two very different things, Ferriss states in his book 'The 4-Hour Workweek'. If you invested like Trump, you'd be ahead of the S and P 500 , here's what the US President is betting on. Trump's financial disclosures reveal he executed 21,285 stock trades in 2025, averaging one trade every five minutes. His portfolio has outperformed the S and P 500, with a 37.3 percent return since his inauguration. Here's a look at the US leader's portfolio . 8th Pay Commission salary hike: How HRA can increase for Level 1-10 employees at 2.0, 2.1, 2.28, 2.57 fitment factors. 8th Pay Commission salary calculator: Employee bodies are demanding higher house rent allowance percentages for central government staff. The 8th Pay Commission's meeting in Kolkata will conclude today. HRA is a significant salary component, directly linked to basic pay revisions. Calculations show potential HRA increases with different fitment factors. EPFO passbook portal restored after software upgrade; members can access accounts again ahead of 8.25 percent interest credit. The EPFO has restored its passbook portal after a two-week outage due to a database upgrade. Members can access their accounts again ahead of 8.25 percent interest credit. SCSS versus MIS: Which offers higher interest on a rupees 5 lakh investment?. Senior Citizens Savings Scheme offers a higher interest rate than the Post Office Monthly Income Scheme. An investment of five lakh rupees in SCSS yields approximately forty-one thousand rupees annually. The Post Office Monthly Income Scheme provides nearly thirty-seven thousand rupees in annual interest. SCSS offers tax benefits on principal investment under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act. Same salary, different loan amount? Here's why banks may treat borrowers differently. Lenders consider factors beyond income when approving loans, such as repayment history and financial habits. Two individuals with identical salaries may experience different loan outcomes based on their overall financial profiles. Confused about ITR forms? Check the right ITR for salaried, pensioners, students and other taxpayers. Salaried individuals, pensioners, and students must select the appropriate ITR form for AY 2026-2027. Taxpayers not requiring an audit can use ITR-1, ITR-2, or ITR-3 for their filings. The due date for filing income tax returns is July 31, 2027. Certain transactions necessitate filing an ITR even below basic exemption limits. Which ITR form should you file? A guide for salaried employees, pensioners and other taxpayers. The ITR forms have been revised for AY 2026-27, affecting ITR-1, ITR-4 and ITR-2. Taxpayers must ensure correct filing by reviewing income sources and changes to avoid complications. The filing deadline is 31 July 2026 for individuals and non-audited entities. Forgot your ITR login password? Here's how to reset it without access to Aadhaar-linked mobile number. Taxpayers can reset their income tax e-filing portal password using various methods if they forget it, even if they don't have access to their Aadhaar-linked mobile number. Step-by-step guide here. AMFI Data: Gold ETF inflows rebound to rupees 3,443 crore in June after May outflows, here's what changed. Gold ETF inflows rebounded sharply to rupees 3,443 crore in June, reversing May's outflows as investors returned after profit booking. Experts say cooling gold prices and persistent global uncertainties revived demand for the safe-haven asset. Forgot your Income Tax e-filing password? Here's how to reset it without access to your registered mobile number. Taxpayers can reset their Income Tax e-filing portal passwords without a registered mobile number. Options include using a Digital Signature Certificate or net banking facilities. If these are unavailable, an email request with necessary documents can be sent. EPF versus PPF versus NPS: Which retirement scheme is meant for you?. Building a solid retirement corpus is crucial for financial planning. Popular schemes in India include EPF, PPF, and NPS, each differing in eligibility, contributions, and benefits. Details here. 22k gold rate today: Check 24k, 22k, 20k, 18k gold prices (July 10, 2026) at Tanishq, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Joyalukkas, Kalyan Jewellers and IBJA. Gold prices saw an increase today across major Indian jewellery brands. Tanishq's 22k gold jewellery is priced at rupees 13,320 per gram. Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Kalyan Jewellers, and Joyalukkas also show similar rates. IBJA's indicative rates for gold and silver were released for July 9. These value mutual funds delivered the highest returns in 5 years. Should you invest?. Value funds, notably HSBC and ICICI Prudential, have yielded strong returns. Experts suggest that investors adopt a mixed strategy, combining value and growth stocks, to enhance portfolio performance throughout different market cycles. Should you go for accidental death insurance despite having term insurance? Check this before deciding. Term insurance offers protection, but an accidental death rider provides additional payout. This rider is an optional add-on, not a replacement for base coverage. It specifically covers fatalities directly resulting from accidents like road or air mishaps. Individuals in high-risk occupations or frequent travelers should consider this rider. ITR filing: Switched jobs during FY 2025-26? Follow this checklist to avoid errors. Employees who changed jobs during FY 2025-26 should report salary from all employers while filing ITR for AY 2026-27. Verify Form 16, Form 26AS and AIS, report total salary correctly, and avoid tax notices, interest charges and refund delays. Child education allowance tax benefit in ITR filing for FY 25-26: Know when you can claim it. Salaried employees can claim child education allowance tax exemption under the old tax regime. This exemption is available for up to two children per taxpayer. For FY 2026-27, the monthly limit increases significantly to rupees 3,000 per child. Self-employed individuals and those opting for the new tax regime cannot claim this benefit. Mutual fund delivered 15 percent CAGR? Why your returns may still be lower. Your mutual fund's published return and your actual return are often not the same. Experts explain why investor behaviour, rather than fund performance, is usually responsible for the gap. Invested in foreign shares? Know how to file ITR with 'relevant accounting period' for reporting foreign assets in Schedule FA?. Indian residents holding foreign assets must report them in Schedule FA. This reporting uses the calendar year ending December 31, 2025. Assets held even for one day during this period require declaration. This applies irrespective of the foreign country's fiscal year. CBDT directs AIS to show foreign investments, strengthening tax transparency and compliance. CBDT will upload foreign investment and overseas financial account information into taxpayers' AIS within 90 days under the AEOI framework. The move aims to improve tax transparency, simplify compliance, strengthen verification of foreign assets and encourage accurate income tax return filing. 8th Pay Commission: Should the highest government salary be capped? Here's what employee bodies want. Employee bodies have proposed contrasting approaches to determining the highest salary under the 8th Pay Commission, with some seeking a 1:12 cap between minimum and maximum pay while others oppose any such limit. New tax regime: 7 smart ways salaried employees can reduce their tax while filing ITR in 2026. Salaried individuals can still reduce their tax liability under the new tax regime for FY 2025-26. 20x rule explained: Simple property price test to decide if renting or buying a home is smarter. The 20x rule helps homebuyers compare property prices to rental values before deciding whether to buy or rent. Here's how the price‐to‐rent ratio works, its benefits and limitations and how EMIs, appreciation and personal finances shape smarter housing choices. EPS pension calculator: Check your monthly pension under EPS 2026 after 10, 15, 20 and 25 years of service. The government has notified the Employees' Pension Scheme (EPS), 2026 under the Code on Social Security, 2020, replacing EPS-1995 and the Employees' Family Pension Scheme, 1971.

transcript.title: Science and technology
transcript.text: Next, science and technology. Mark Zuckerberg returns to X after 3 years to unveil Meta's Muse Spark 1.1 AI model, developer API. Zuckerberg's first activity on the platform in over three years signaled Meta's latest push to compete directly with OpenAI and Anthropic in the rapidly expanding market for enterprise AI models. Lava to launch 'Virat' series phones in India, Flipkart availability confirmed. Lava will soon launch its new 'Virat' series of smartphones in India via Flipkart. The company has confirmed that its new online-first series will feature both 4G and 5G devices Meta's new AI glasses may continuously record what users see and hear: Report. Meta is developing AI-powered smart glasses that capture images and audio throughout the day. Moto G77 Power launched in India: Check price, specifications and sale date. Motorola has launched the Moto G77 Power in India, featuring a 7,000mAh battery, 50MP camera, and MediaTek Dimensity 6400 processor. Pixel 11 launch date revealed: Made by Google event announced for August 12. Google's next Made by Google launch event is set for August 12, 2026, in New York City. ChatGPT image generation down- OpenAI says 'implementing mitigation'. ChatGPT faced a widespread outage on Tuesday, with users reporting issues generating images and accessing past chats. OpenAI confirms it's investigating. Apple now asks users before sending Apple Intelligence requests to Google Cloud. Apple's integration of Google's AI has improved features but requires sharing user data with Google Cloud. Apple finally brings back card payments for subscriptions and App Store purchases in India. Apple has resumesdcard payments for App Store purchases in India after a four-year hiatus. Initially, only Visa and Mastercard will be accepted. Apple could bring back its iPhone X playbook for the iPhone Ultra. Apple could be planning to use the iPhone X playbook with the iPhone Ultra by delaying the initial pre-sales and orders for the foldable iPhone. New AI agent can hack systems and deploy ransomware without human help. A new report reveals that AI agents can autonomously execute ransomware attacks, evidenced by the case of JADEPUFFER, which exploited a critical vulnerability to infiltrate systems. iOS 27 beta 2 leak reveals new clue about Apple's camera-equipped AirPods: Here's what we know. Apple could be teasing a new AirPods Pro with cameras with the latest beta version of iOS 27 beta. WhatsApp usernames: Will they make India's digital conversations safer or less trustworthy? Experts weigh in. As digital platforms evolve in India, the way people identify themselves online is clearly changing too. WhatsApp's move towards usernames is more than a feature update. WhatsApp username row: Zoho's Arattai to disable username feature. Zoho's Arattai will remove its username-based account feature after the regulatory challenges faced by WhatsApp. Meta spent billions on AI, but Zuckerberg says progress has been slower than expected: Report. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg acknowledged the shortcomings of the company's recent restructuring and the slow development of AI agents. WhatsApp issues username FAQs amid govt scrutiny, Can someone find you with it? Could you be impersonated? Check details. Meta Platforms' messaging app WhatsApp has released detailed set of frequently asked questions (FAQs) for users on its new username feature following controversy over safety and security of the rollout. Oppo Reno 16, Reno 16c launched in India: Check price, specs and more. Oppo launched the Reno 16 series featuring Snapdragon processors and AMOLED displays. Prices in India start at rupees 46,999 for the Reno 16c and rupees 61,999 for the Reno 16 Meta plans to rent AI computing power as it takes on AWS, Google Cloud: Report. Meta is developing a cloud infrastructure to sell AI computing access, competing with AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. WhatsApp usernames could open the platform to impersonations and scams, warn cybersecurity experts: Here is how. Meta's WhatsApp is launching usernames for privacy, enabling users to interact without disclosing phone numbers. While this can protect user identity, experts warn of risks like impersonation and scams, highlighting the necessity for robust anti-abuse measures to ensure safety amid these changes. Key details about iPhone 18 Pro leak online after hackers gain access to 630 GB data from Tata Electronics. Leaks from Tata Electronics reveal details about Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro, including component suppliers and internal documents after a ransomware attack. This breach, involving over 200,000 files, threatens Apple's supplier relationships and business strategy ahead of the September launch. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G debuts in India with 120Hz AMOLED display, price starts at rupees 28,999. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G features a 6.7-inch Full HD+ Super AMOLED display, Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 50MP triple rear camera, and 5,000mAh battery. OnePlus N6 5G launched in India with 8,000mAh battery, Dimensity 6360 Apex processor: Check price and specs. The OnePlus N6 features a 6.75-inch HD display, MediaTek Dimensity 6360 Apex processor, 8,000mAh battery, and military-grade durability. WhatsApp to let users reserve usernames from next week: Here's how it works. WhatsApp introduces a username system to eliminate the need to share your phone number. The company will allow users to select their usernames starting next week. WhatsApp to let users chat without sharing phone numbers: Username feature coming soon. WhatsApp, which says it has more than 3 billion users globally, has until now allowed users to be contacted by anyone who has their phone number. Will iPhone 17 Pro Max cost nearly rupees 2 lakh in India? Leak suggests so. The iPhone 17 Pro, currently priced at rupees 1,34,900, could reportedly retail between rupees 1,54,900 and rupees 1,69,900. The iPhone 17 Pro Max may be priced between rupees 1,84,900 and rupees 1,99,900, compared with its current price of rupees 1,49,900. Samsung Galaxy M47 5G launched in India with 6,000mAh battery, 50MP OIS camera. Samsung has launched the Galaxy M47 5G in India with a price of rupees 22,999. The phone features a Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 6.7-inch AMOLED display, 6,000mAh battery, and a 50MP camera.

transcript.title: Development and policy
transcript.text: Now to development, infrastructure and government policy. TERI Calls for Accelerated Adoption of Solar Thermal Technologies to Decarbonize India's Industrial Sector. India is becoming a shaping power. Technology Advisory Group (TAG) of Empowered Technology Group (ETG) meets to discuss A Strategic Roadmap for India's Telecom Sector and establishing a dedicated "Communication Technology Task Force". The India FDI Story: Top Sectors Attracting Foreign Investment. From Pakistan to Trump, Modi's foreign policy has cost India its moral authority, says Salman Khurshid. Why India Is Focussing On Myanmar As Part Of Its Act East Policy. World Bank Supports India's Solar Rooftop Program to Boost Clean Energy, Create Jobs, and Unlock Private Capital. India-Japan co-operation is transitioning from a development partnership to a geo-economic alliance. Indian Navy to commission indigenous stealth frigate Mahendragiri on 11 July. World Bank okays USD 890m to back India's rooftop solar scheme.

transcript.title: Across India
transcript.text: Turning to the big national stories. 'We'll expose you' for trial delay: SC to Maharashtra. Supreme Court criticizes states for delaying trials while opposing bail pleas. The court noted a negligent attitude that dents the right to a speedy trial. One accused has been in jail for four years with few witnesses examined. Maharashtra was found remiss in producing the accused before the trial court. Future conflicts may take new forms: Rajnath. NEW DELHI: Defence minister Rajnath Singh Friday said that "future conflicts could emerge in new and unforeseen forms, and therefore, Indian soldiers should remain physically and mentally prepared, continuously upgrade their skills and master emerging technologies", reports Surendra Singh. Rajpal Yadav gets 3-month jail in cheque-bounce cases. NEW DELHI: Delhi HC Friday upheld the conviction of actor Rajpal Yadav in multiple cheque-bounce cases and sentenced him to three months' imprisonment. FCI makes distilleries accountable for subsidised rice, warns of criminal cases. Food Corporation of India has strengthened rules for subsidized rice distribution. Distilleries are now directly accountable for any misuse of this grain. The Food Corporation of India will file criminal cases for diversion or misuse. This move aims to prevent diversion and improve oversight of the ethanol supply chain. May need to regulate tourist influx to protect Kashmir's serene beauty: Omar. Jammu and Kashmir's Chief Minister acknowledged rising tourist arrivals and suggested regulation. He emphasized protecting natural assets and ensuring visitor experiences remain serene. The Chief Minister advocated for value-based tourism over a volume-based approach. He stressed the importance of implementing tourism master plans with community input. After Farooq's protest invite, Mirwaiz calls for Art 370 inclusion, BJP shreds NC over 2010 killings. Farooq Abdullah invited politicians for a protest demanding Jammu and Kashmir statehood restoration. Mirwaiz Umar Farooq suggested broadening the protest's agenda for political resolution. The BJP rejected the invitation, criticizing the National Conference's past actions. The National Conference is still awaiting permission for the planned protest. IRCTC to launch 'faster, clutter-free' booking site. The IRCTC website's beta version will soon launch, offering a faster booking experience. This revamped site promises a clutter-free interface without unnecessary distractions. Seat availability across all coach classes will be displayed clearly. Ticket booking steps are reduced for a faster checkout process. From Everest to space: Nasa's PIO astronaut Anil Menon to travel to ISS on 8-month mission on Tuesday. Anil Menon, an Indian-American astronaut, begins his first space mission. He will spend eight months aboard the International Space Station. Menon will research microgravity's physiological impacts and test new medical technologies. His Indian heritage stems from his father who emigrated from India. As Satluj creates ripples... Centre considers amending IT rules, make certification must for non-theatre films too. The makers of the film, earlier titled Punjab '95, waged a long battle with the Central Board of Film Certification (CBFC) over 127 suggested cuts, which they refused to accept. Diversion of rice meant for poor in North-East: 5 senior Food Corporation officials suspended over suspected collusion with private buyer. FCI Executive Director (Joint Secretary-rank officer) among those under scrutiny Narendra Modi first Indian PM to visit New Zealand in 40 years, trade and sports top agenda. Modi is slated to meet Luxon at Government House in Auckland for bilateral talks on Saturday. Government panel wants ban on Satluj to stay, says film whitewashes terror. The film is set in Punjab during the tumultuous insurgency in the 1990s and is based on the life of human rights activist Jaswant Singh Khalra, and shows his death in police custody in the wake of his campaign to probe hundreds of disappearances during the militancy years. Husband, wife arrested over hostage killings that shook Manipur. Police said couple had been 'identified by witnesses when the abduction took place'. BJP man drops out of Bihar bypoll race against Prashant Kishor. With JSP founder Prashant Kishor entering the fray, Bankipur is turning into a prestige battle for the BJP, especially since its national president Nitin Nabin has represented the seat five times since 2006 'She was visibly distressed': Parents cite new CCTV footage, question chargesheet in Jaipur school girl's death. In the video, as per the parents, she was allegedly subjected to repeated bullying by her classmates. The Daily Catch-Up: Your evening news briefing. Missed today's biggest stories? 30 years after Srinagar violence, Shabir Shah among 6 Hurriyat leaders chargesheeted by NIA. Chargesheet also names Syed Ali Shah Geelani, Abdul Gani Lone and Yaqoob Wakeel , all three of whom have died during the pendency of proceedings

transcript.title: Around the world
transcript.text: And finally, here is what is happening around the world. Forced to wait his turn, Marine Le Pen's deputy Bardella returns to the shadows. Thirty-year-old Jordan Bardella had been groomed for success as France's next hard-right leader. He will now have to wait longer. Zulu king expresses regret after video captures tirade against his wife. In the footage widely shared in South Africa, King Misuzulu threatens to physically assault his wife and accuses her of cheating. Man fatally shot by ICE in Houston was not intended target, DHS says. Immigration agents were looking for a different person when they shot Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a traffic stop, officials say. Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets. Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI's nascent hardware business is "rotten to its core." Nolan Wells' family demands answers about US teen's death after boating trip. Wells' body was found in the water near Mississippi's Horn Island days after he went on a boating trip there with friends. Superb Sinner ends Djokovic's latest bid for history. Jannik Sinner produces a devastating display to end Novak Djokovic's latest bid for history and set up a Wimbledon final against Alexander Zverev. Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies. The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea. At Canada's biggest rodeo, the starting gun is fired in the fight over Alberta separation. Canadian unity takes centre stage at the Calgary Stampede as fears of a Brexit-style upset looms over the October vote on Alberta's future. How an app in South Korea will let victims track their stalkers. Officials say the app will help stalking victims, but some experts question the impact it might have. All the best looks from Paris Haute Couture Week 2026. Scorching temperatures in the French capital accompanied the hottest week in haute couture. Watch: Inside the 30-hour dating retreat run by monks. Forget coffee or drinks, the latest dating trend in South Korea takes place somewhere very different, a Buddhist temple.

transcript.title: Sign-off
transcript.text: That is your briefing. Stay sharp, and have a strong day.
